items.summary: In the Hero section (frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx), update the 'Contact Us' and 'Our Services' CTA buttons to have a translucent/frosted semi-transparent appearance. Apply a semi-transparent background (e.g., white or navy with low opacity), a subtle backdrop-blur effect, and a light border to achieve a frosted-glass look that complements the existing maritime navy/seafoam theme. Ensure text remains legible and hover states are preserved.
